---
name: Data Error Report
about: Report incorrect, stale, or missing legal data
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data-error
assignees: ''
---

## Error Type

- [ ] Wrong text (provision text doesn't match official source)
- [ ] Wrong citation (citation URL is broken or incorrect)
- [ ] Stale data (law has been amended but MCP shows old version)
- [ ] Missing act (law exists but is not in the MCP)
- [ ] Missing provision (act exists but specific article/section is missing)

## Jurisdiction

<!-- e.g., NL, SE, DE, SI -->

## Tool Used

<!-- e.g., get_provision, search_legislation -->

## Input

```json

```

## Expected Result

<!-- What should the MCP return? Include official source URL if possible. -->

## Actual Result

<!-- What did the MCP return? -->

## Official Source URL

<!-- Link to the official government source showing the correct data -->
